ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing entry */,
  "crim" REAL /* Per capita crime rate by town */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of Black residents by town */,
  "lstat" REAL /* Percentage of lower status of the population */,
  "medv" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes in $1000s */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a garage */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a basement */,
  "roof_material" TEXT /* Material of the roof */,
  "heating_system" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_system" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood related to the crime data */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of crime incidents per 1,000 residents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the data was recorded */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "total_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the crime data (e.g., police reports, community surveys) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of households in the neighborhood */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of residents */,
  "school_rating" REAL /* Average school rating in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square miles */,
  "public_transport" TEXT /* Availability of public transport (e.g., bus, subway) */,
  "green_space" REAL /* Percentage of green space in the neighborhood */,
  "walk_score" INTEGER /* Walkability score of the neighborhood */,
  "bike_score" INTEGER /* Bikeability score of the neighborhood */,
  "transit_score" INTEGER /* Transit score of the neighborhood */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification (e.g., residential, commercial, mixed-use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Real estate agency the agent works for */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the agent */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood the agent specializes in */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the business */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the agent (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the agent's profile picture */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent from clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_agents_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "price" REAL /* Listed price of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent responsible for the listing */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property being listed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs to images of the property */,
  "virtual_tour" TEXT /* URL to a virtual tour of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., active, pending, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES real_estate_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who facilitated the sale */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property sold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs to images of the property */,
  "virtual_tour" TEXT /* URL to a virtual tour of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sale (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES real_estate_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend data corresponds to */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in that year */,
  "average_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days properties were on the market */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "gdp_growth" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the area */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the amenity is located */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., Park, School, Shopping Center) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the amenity */,
  "amenity_age" INTEGER /* Age of the amenity */,
  "amenity_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the amenity (e.g., number of seats in a theater) */,
  "amenity_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the amenity */,
  "amenity_website" TEXT /* URL to the amenity's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, search, report generation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the feedback */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES real_estate_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_listings ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the notification */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new listing, price drop) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES real_estate_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES property_listings ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
